params.name: created
params.description: Only return the Checkout Sessions that were created during the given date interval.

params.name: customer
params.description: Only return the Checkout Sessions for the Customer specified.

params.name: customer_details
params.description: Only return the Checkout Sessions for the Customer details specified.

params.name: ending_before
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `ending_before` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, starting with `obj_bar`, your subsequent call can include `ending_before=obj_bar` in order to fetch the previous page of the list.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100, and the default is 10.

params.name: payment_intent
params.description: Only return the Checkout Session for the PaymentIntent specified.

params.name: payment_link
params.description: Only return the Checkout Sessions for the Payment Link specified.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `starting_after` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with `obj_foo`, your subsequent call can include `starting_after=obj_foo` in order to fetch the next page of the list.

params.name: status
params.description: Only return the Checkout Sessions matching the given status.

params.name: subscription
params.description: Only return the Checkout Session for the subscription specified.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

info.name: Stripe Post   Checkout Sessions Session Expire

items.docs:
A Session can be expired when it is in one of these statuses: open

After it expires, a customer can’t complete a Session and customers loading the Session see a message saying the Session is expired.

info.name: Stripe Get   Checkout Sessions Session Line Items

params.name: ending_before
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `ending_before` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, starting with `obj_bar`, your subsequent call can include `ending_before=obj_bar` in order to fetch the previous page of the list.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100, and the default is 10.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `starting_after` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with `obj_foo`, your subsequent call can include `starting_after=obj_foo` in order to fetch the next page of the list.

items.docs: When retrieving a Checkout Session, there is an includable line_items property containing the first handful of those items. There is also a URL where you can retrieve the full (paginated) list of line items.
